title: 'Lotus now blooms from Gangotri to Ganga Sagar': PM Modi lauds historic BJP win in Bengal
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi celebrated the BJP's historic victories in West Bengal, Assam, and Puducherry, attributing the success to the hard work of party workers. He emphasized that these wins signify the triumph of Indian democracy and the Constitution, marking a new era of development and freedom from fear in Bengal.

title: As many say software is dead, Amazon Web Services CEO calls it a 'huge business opportunity’
content: AWS CEO Matt Garman views the AI-driven 'SaaSpocalypse' as a major business opportunity, not a threat.  He highlighted the rise of agentic AI reshaping work and announced new AI-powered tools like the Quick desktop app, aiming to revolutionize personal productivity.  AWS is also deepening its OpenAI partnership, integrating advanced AI models into its cloud services to meet surging demand.

title: Pooran surpasses Sooryavanshi in explosive batting record
content: Nicholas Pooran smashed a 16-ball fifty against Mumbai Indians at the Wankhede Stadium, overtaking Vaibhav Sooryavanshi with five IPL fifties in under 20 balls — second only to Abhishek Sharma’s six. Batting at No. 3 for Lucknow Super Giants, Pooran blasted 63 off 21 balls, underlining his growing dominance as one of IPL 2026’s most destructive batters.

title: How Himanta Biswa Sarma demolished the '3Gs' and built a BJP fortress in Assam
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma has cemented the BJP's dominance in Assam, securing a third consecutive term with a commanding mandate. His strategic brilliance, combining organizational depth, alliances, and welfare outreach, has transformed the state's political landscape, effectively dismantling the Congress's long-standing influence and establishing a new political order.

title: From Bengal shock to Tamil Nadu surprise: Time for exit polls to exit?
content: Exit polls for five assembly elections proved indicative, not definitive, as results day revealed surprising outcomes. While some projections accurately predicted trends in Kerala and Assam, West Bengal and Tamil Nadu witnessed dramatic shifts, with unexpected victories and significant political realignments challenging pre-election forecasts.

title: Assembly election results 2026: Vijay wave, Bengal breakthrough, Kerala reset - 10 takeaways
content: Tamil Nadu witnesses a seismic shift as actor Vijay's party leads, ending decades of Dravidian rule. The BJP achieves a historic win in West Bengal, unseating Mamata Banerjee. Kerala returns to its rotation cycle with the UDF forming the government, while Assam shows pro-incumbency can prevail. These results signal a significant political churn across India.

title: Tamil Nadu shocker: 5 factors that powered TVK Vijay's political blockbuster
content: Actor-turned-politician Thalapathy Vijay's TVK has emerged as the single largest party in Tamil Nadu assembly polls, dramatically altering the state's political landscape. Leveraging star power and organized fan networks, TVK has disrupted the decades-long dominance of the DMK and AIADMK, resonating with voters seeking an alternative.

title: Why Heath Ledger’s estate didn’t list daughter Matilda Ledger
content: Heath Ledger's $16.3 million estate, initially willed to his parents and sisters, ultimately went to his daughter Matilda. Despite his 2003 will predating her birth, his family ensured Matilda and her mother, Michelle Williams, were fully provided for. Co-stars also donated salaries from his final film, ensuring a secure future for the young girl.

title: TVK storms Tamil Nadu but falls short of majority: Who will Vijay ally with?
content: Mega movie star "Thalapathy" Vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), has emerged as a significant force in Tamil Nadu politics, disrupting the DMK and AIADMK's dominance. While TVK secured triple-digit leads in early trends, it fell short of a majority, prompting debate on structural shifts versus celebrity appeal and raising questions about Vijay's solo political path.

title: Kerala Election Results 2026: Full list of winners and losers; Congress-led UDF set for comeback
content: Early trends for the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections show a significant shift, with the Congress-led UDF projected for a commanding victory, leading in over 100 seats. The ruling LDF faces strong anti-incumbency, while the BJP remains a marginal player. This outcome suggests a return to Kerala's traditional pattern of alternating governments.

title: Dhamne takes 'confidence' from first ATP Challenger final run
content: Manas Dhamne finished runner-up in his first-ever ATP Challenger final in Shymkent, Kazakhstan. The 18-year-old has had two quarter-final runs at this level this year while clinching an M15 title and playing the qualifying rounds of two Masters tournaments. His progress has many parties, chief, perhaps, is his own mature head.

title: BJP winners list in West Bengal Election 2026: Full constituency-wise results
content: In a historic electoral upset, the BJP has secured its first-ever assembly election victory in West Bengal, unseating Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee after 15 years. The results, reflecting a record 92.47% voter turnout, saw the BJP's "Bhoy out, Bharosa in" slogan resonate strongly, surpassing the TMC's "Maa maati manush" narrative.

title: Rohit Sharma’s heartfelt gesture steals show after accidental hit on ground staff
content: During a Mumbai Indians training session, Rohit Sharma paused his practice to check on a ground staff member hit by a ball. He ensured the injured staffer received an ice pack and medicine, showcasing his compassionate nature. This incident occurred as MI faces playoff pressure with Rohit's return from injury uncertain.

title: Assembly election results 2026: Top 10 winners and losers
content: The 2026 assembly elections have dramatically reshaped India's political landscape. Vijay's debut in Tamil Nadu, the BJP's gains in West Bengal and Kerala's return to rotation mark significant shifts. Established powers face challenges as new forces emerge, redefining narratives and pushing others to the margins. This analysis highlights the key winners and losers.

title: ‘I’ll send a private plane!’: Mark Wood amused by bizarre IPL offer during illness
content: Mark Wood recounted a bizarre IPL offer: a franchise owner proposed a private jet flight for a match despite Wood being seriously ill.  The owner insisted on Wood playing, even suggesting a quick flight out and back.  Wood, though tempted by the novelty, ultimately declined, prioritizing his health over the surreal proposition.

title: 'No need to be afraid': Mamata to TMC counting agents; assures 'win after sunset'
content: Directing the party candidates and counting agents not to leave the couting centre, Mamata said her party would win after the sunset and that there is "no need for anyone to be afraid". Mamata, who is seeking the fourth strait term, alleged a foul play by the Election Commission, and claimed that there's a BJP's ​plan to show themselves ahead first.

title: RG Kar victim’s mother, BJP candidate Ratna Debnath leads from Panihati
content: In a closely watched West Bengal election, RG Kar rape victim’s mother and BJP candidate Ratna Debnath is currently leading in Panihati.  She is campaigning on women's safety and her daughter's memory against TMC's Tirthankar Ghosh.  Nationally, BJP leads on 121 seats, TMC on 71, with high voter turnout recorded.

title: IPL 2026: Bad news for CSK! MS Dhoni skips Delhi trip as injury delays return
content: Chennai Super Kings face a significant blow as MS Dhoni misses their IPL 2026 clash against Delhi Capitals on Tuesday due to delay in injury recovery. He remains in Chennai for rehabilitation, raising concerns about his availability. This absence impacts CSK's playoff aspirations as they navigate a crucial phase of the tournament.

title: PSL: Babar Azam's Rohit Sharma-inspired 'walk' celebration goes wrong
content: Babar Azam captained Peshawar Zalmi to their second PSL title, defeating Hyderabad Kingsmen by five wickets. A light-hearted attempt to recreate Rohit Sharma's iconic walk during celebrations became a viral meme. All-rounder Aaron Hardie was the star, excelling with both bat and ball in the final.

title: 'They cheated people': Humayun Kabir congratulates West Bengal for defeating TMC
content: West Bengal's assembly election results reveal widespread public anger against the Trinamool Congress, according to AUJP founder Humayun Kabir. He accused the ruling party of extensive corruption, surpassing even British-era exploitation.  Kabir, a former TMC leader, expressed confidence in winning his seats, as early trends indicated a significant shift in power.

title: ‘Watching Virat, you understand the art of batting’: RCB star on Kohli’s impact
content: Jacob Bethell is making the most of his IPL 2026 opportunity with Royal Challengers Bengaluru. He is learning from Virat Kohli and other senior players. Bethell's role has increased due to Phil Salt's absence. He is adapting to the high tempo of the league. Bethell's development could be crucial for RCB's playoff push.

title: West Bengal Assembly Election Results 2026: The colour changes, the argument remains
content: The BJP, which had won 77 seats and 38.15% vote share in 2021, is now showing a dramatic surge in counting trends. By noon, several live trackers had the BJP crossing or approaching the halfway mark, with leads in the 140–150 range and vote share estimates hovering around 46–48%, while the TMC trailed significantly behind.

title: Bengal results: BJP makes gains in TMC strongholds, including Muslim belts; leads in over 80 seats
content: Early West Bengal election results indicate the Bharatiya Janata Party is making significant inroads in Muslim-majority constituencies.  This suggests a shift in voter allegiance.  The Trinamool Congress faces challenges converting votes despite secularism campaigns.  Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee urges party workers to remain steadfast, asserting the TMC is still ahead.  High voter turnout was recorded across phases.

title: West Bengal election results LIVE: Close fight in Bhabanipur after Suvendu takes a lead over Mamata
content: Not only has the BJP been able to hold its strongholds of north Bengal and southwest Bengal but made significant inroads in erstwhile Trinamool bastions of Kolkata and adjoining district.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: IUML enters new era as Fathima Thahiliya becomes first woman MLA
content: While the IUML has long faced criticism for not fielding women in strong or winnable constituencies, Thahiliya’s victory has challenged that perception and marked a clear shift in narrative

title: Tamil Nadu election results 2026 LIVE: DMK’s political journey will continue without any slackness, says Stalin after electoral defeat
content: TVK secures 82 seats, leading over DMK with 44 seats as of 8:40 p.m.; PM Modi and Congress leader Rahul Gandhi congratulate TVK's poll performance

title: Four killed, two injured as ambulance rams into stationary truck near Srikalahasti
content: Ambulance was carrying a patient from Kolkata to Bengaluru when it hit a truck from behind on the Tirupati-Naidupeta stretch of the national highway

title: Kerala Assembly polls | V. D. Satheesan: Captaining a resurgent Congress in Kerala
content: UDF’s emphatic win in the Kerala Assembly polls has not only silenced Satheesan’s critics, but reasserted the political supremacy of the Congress leader, who was given the task of reinvigorating the party and its disenchanted workers after he was chosen as the Leader of the Opposition following UDF’s electoral debacle in 2021

title: BJP reduced to one seat in Tamil Nadu Assembly, top leaders defeated
content: In 2021, the party had won four seats. This time, M. Bhojarajan alone won the Udhagamandalam Assembly segment by a slim margin of 976 votes.

title: TDP Mahanadu 2026 in Nellore from May 27 to 29; Bhoomi Puja at IKSEZ on May 6
content: Three-day annual conclave of the ruling party to be held at IFFCO Kisan Special Economic Zone in Kodavaluru mandal from May 27 to 29; Bhoomi Puja on Wednesday

title: West Bengal election results: full list of winners
content: The elections were held under the shadow of the SIR exercise, in which the names of around 91 lakh people were removed from the electoral rolls, which shrank to around 6.82 crore.

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: BDJS, Twenty20 fail to leave a political impact
content: Of the 19 seats it contested, Twenty20 could put up a fight only in Kunnathunad, bagging 40,000-odd votes. Yet party founder Sabu Jacob believes its alliance with the BJP will work in the long run. Of the 22 BDJS candidates, only the Aroor nominee could come up with a decent show. The performance raises existential questions for the two parties

title: Kerala Assembly polls: BJP fails to gain ground in Thrissur
content: Much-hyped ‘Suresh Gopi effect' falls flat;  high-decibel campaign, big names and past gains fail to translate into votes as party slips to third place

title: Andhra Pradesh sanctions ₹369.20 crore for modernisation of Guntur channel
content: Project to stabilise irrigation for over 33,000 acres across 33 villages in the Krishna delta, benefiting more than four lakh people; works to cover main canal and distributaries from 0 to 47 km

title: How the BJP won West Bengal
content: Prime Minister’s 19 rallies, Home Minister’s ubiquitous presence reassured BJP voters they would not be abandoned as in 2021; mending of fractures in the State unit, Central Ministers’ support pay off in big win

title: Kerala Election Results 2026 LIVE: Pinarayi Vijayan resigns as Kerala CM after LDF debacle
content: Congress-led United Democratic Front has the last laugh in 2026 Kerala Assembly polls with a historic win as CPI(M)-led LDF falters. BJP secures Nemom, Kazhakuttam and Chathannoor seats

title: Voters deliver a decisive victory for the Congress-led UDF in Kerala Assembly election
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party bagged three seats in Nemom and Kazhakuttom in Thiruvananthapuram and Chathanoor in Kollam, fundamentally realigning Kerala’s LDF-UDF ‘revolving door’ politics

title: Assam election results LIVE: BJP-led NDA secures third straight term; Himanta wins Jalukbari seat
content: Congress unlikely to cross 20-seat tally; Himanta urges “good” Hindu Congress leaders to join the BJP

title: Naidu calls for transforming local products into global brands
content: Chief Minister stresses integrated road, rail and port connectivity, logistics-linked infrastructure and district-wise mega industrial parks to boost competitiveness, MSMEs and employment

title: With Bengal poll verdict, ‘lotus’ is blooming from Gangotri to Gangasagar: PM Modi
content: The Prime Minister said winning and losing are a natural part of democracy and politics, but the people of the five States have shown the world why the country is the mother of democracy

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: BJP emerges victorious in three seats
content: At Nemom, BJP State president Rajeev Chandrasekhar defeated Communist Party of India (Marxist) candidate and Minister V. Sivankutty by 4,978 votes.  For former Union Minister V. Muraleedharan, victory came after a photo finish at Kazhakuttam. The most surprising victory for BJP was at Chathannur, where B.B. Gopakumar defeated CPI’s R. Rajendran by 4,398 votes

title: Naidu orders AI push in governance, ₹1 crore each for districts to tackle water woes
content: At RTGS review meet, CM clears AI advisory council, M.P.-style drone workshops, recognition of vehicle dealers as Additional Registration Authorities, special funds for drinking water, and mandatory field visits by top officials to strengthen public connect and service delivery

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026 results: UDF sweeps Wayanad; Minister O.R. Kelu suffers defeat
content: Kelu, CPI(M) leader and Minister in the outgoing Cabinet, lost to Congress candidate Usha Vijayan by a margin of 10,543 votes

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: S. Rajendran spoils the party for CPI(M) in Devikulam
content: Rajendran’s move to  BJP saw him secure 15,032 votes — largely from the plantation sector — effectively paving the way for a  United Democratic Front victory

title: Davanagere South: Grandson’s victory with reduced margin in Shamanur bastion matter of concern
content: The challenge before the newly-elected Samarth Mallikarjun, who won with a margin of 5,708 votes, will be to win back the goodwill of the disgruntled voter in the constituency

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Cong. high command will take a decision on CM candidate in two days: Satheesan
content: Satheesan says his promise to the people is good governance, transparency and accountability and that performance monitoring will be a strong point of the governance

title: Kerala Assembly polls: rebel candidates deal heavy blows to CPI(M) in Taliparamba, Payyannur
content: CPI(M) dissidents T.K. Govindan and V. Kunhikrishnan emerge victorious. Kunhikrishnan’s win as a UDF-supported Independent and Govindan’s historic victory assumes significance as both candidates had called for reform and internal democracy within CPI(M).

title: DMK’s fortress of Chennai breached like never before
content: The DMK’s downfall in Chennai is drastic compared to the previous election in 2021, in which the alliance it led not only won all the 16 constituencies in the district, but also secured over 50% of vote share in 11 of them

title: Rajnath Singh pushes for edge in high-tech warfare at defence symposium
content: The Defence Minister stresses that future warfare will be shaped by rapid technological transformation and the element of surprise. He points out unconventional threats, including weaponisation of everyday technologies as seen in recent attacks in West Asia

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: High vigil in Kozhikode to prevent clashes in sensitive areas
content: The police have also sought the cooperation of senior leaders of all political parties to ensure peaceful victory celebrations

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: UDF wave dismantles long-standing Left strongholds across Kollam
content: While the UDF captured eight out of 11 seats and the BJP made a historic breakthrough by winning Chathannur, the LDF has been reduced to just two seats, Punalur and Kottarakara

title: Bagalkot bypoll: AHINDA focus, choice of accessible candidate tilted scales in favour of Congress
content: Behind the Congress victory are said to be the personal involvement of Mr. Siddaramaiah, who spent six days in Bagalkot addressing rallies, meeting leaders and going door-to-door in some areas

title: KKCCI welcomes ₹28.47 crore State support for air connectivity
content: The Kalyana Karnataka Chamber of Commerce and Industry has called for the inclusion of the region under the next phase of the UDAN 2.0 scheme

title: Election Results Live Updates: "Bengal Has Seen Poriborton Today": PM Modi On BJP's Big Victory
content: Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: Exit polls predict a close competition between Trinamool Congress and BJP in West Bengal

title: BJP '200 Paar' In Bengal, Vijay Delivers Tamil Nadu Blockbuster
content: If the results do not veer from the current trajectory, the outcome would be a churning in the Opposition INDIA block, while for the BJP, it would paint a saffron wave that stretches from the northeast all the way to Gujarat.

title: In BJP's Triumph Over Trinamool, An 'Anga-Banga-Kalinga' Completion
content: Election Results 2026: For the BJP, what is unfolding is the completion of a political corridor across the eastern flank of the country from Bihar to West Bengal to Odisha.

title: Tamil Nadu Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: Vijay's TVK Ahead In Over 100 Seats, MK Stalin Loses Stronghold
content: Tamil Nadu Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: While most exit polls have predicted DMK's second straight win, one suggested a huge wave of the "Vijay effect" in the state this time.

title: BJP's Pradyut Bordoloi, Who Quit Congress, Wins From Dispur In Assam
content: Pradyut Bordoloi defeated Congress' Mira Borthakur Goswami and independent candidate Jayanta Kumar Das in Dispur.

title: Puducherry Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: NDA Set To Return In Puducherry, Chief Minister Rangasamy Leads From Thattanchavady
content: Puducherry Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: A record voter turnout of 89.87% was reported, marking the highest participation ever in the Union Territory since its merger with India in 1964.

title: Amit Shah And The 5 Architects Of BJP's Historic Bengal Win
content: West Bengal assembly election results 2026: Strategic roles played by five central leaders alongside Amit Shah took BJP to Bengal win

title: Shooting At Lake Near Oklahoma City Sends At Least 12 People To Hospitals
content: Victims of the party shooting were in "various conditions" with 10 people were rushed to hospitals , while others drove themselves.

title: 13 Kerala Ministers Lose, Pinarayi Vijayan Retains Seat With Reduced Margin
content: Thiruvananthapuram, May 4 (IANS) In a stunning electoral setback for the ruling Left, a majority of the outgoing Cabinet led by Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan has been voted out, signalling a decisive shift in Kerala’s political landscape.

title: "Congratulations To Entire BJP Family": Raghav Chadha On Historic Bengal Win
content: Raghav Chadha, who joined the BJP last month after a controversial exit from the Aam Aadmi Party, took to X to share his thoughts on the results.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The Rise Of Vijay, The Fall Of Stalin - And A Puzzle For Palaniswami
content: For the defeated Stalin, this verdict is almost a reminder of the misfortune that beset his father, who was brought down by Jayalalithaa in 1991, 2001 and 2011. Except that his father never lost an assembly seat.

title: UAE Says Iran Launched Drone Attack on ADNOC Tanker In Strait of Hormuz
content: "Using the Strait of Hormuz as a tool of economic coercion or blackmail represents acts of piracy" the foreign ministry said.

title: Kerala Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Congress-Led UDF Crosses Halfway Mark, Wins 27 Seats, BJP Leads In 3
content: Kerala Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: The outcome is significant for all three alliances as they look to strengthen their presence in the state's changing political landscape.

title: Operation Sindoor Showed India's Tech-Driven Military Might: Rajnath Singh
content: India launched Operation Sindoor on May 7 last year in response to the April 22 Pahalgam terror attack. The operation targeted terror infrastructure in territories controlled by Pakistan.

title: "Tribute To Ajit Pawar": Sunetra Pawar On Historic Win In Baramati Bypoll Win
content: Sunetra Pawar also thanked the family's patriarch and NCP (SP) chief Sharad Pawar and Baramati MP Supriya Sule for their support.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The 'Silent' Bengal Voter Was Always Keeping Score. Mamata Just Didn't See It
content: Bengal is not an easy audience. So if the saffron wave has broken in here, the deepest explanation is this: people did not vote only for a party. They voted for a different emotional contract.

title: Vijay’s TVK party emerges as formidable force in Tamil Nadu; all you need to know about its journey
content: vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), is emerging as a formidable force in Tamil Nadu . trends suggest a dramatic rise for the debutant outfit, challenging established players like DMK and AIDMK in the state .
